name: F M Kuzmeskus Inc
districts_or_customers: ~100 school bus routes across Massachusetts and Vermont (Franklin County area, Western MA)
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility in 2023, joining its family of transportation companies; no longer independent.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Already owned by Beacon Mobility (Audax-backed competitor platform). Exclude from outreach list.

name: Miles Away Charter LLC
principals: Marvin Mills (listed as Owner per source data)
districts_or_customers: DC Public Schools (DCPS) emergency/awarded contracts (GAGA-2023-E-0146, GAGA-2024-E-0414); DC metro area charter and athletics transport
recent_news: Awarded DCPS emergency contracts in 2023 and 2024; women-owned (DBE-certified) DC metro operator. A DCPS bus driver DWI incident in 2023 reportedly involved a charter company in DC area (vendor identity not confirmed for Miles Away).
fit_notes: Very small DC metro charter/school operator with DCPS contracts. Tiny fleet/revenue limits tuck-in value, but DBE status and DCPS relationships could be niche entry point. Marginal target.

name: Koch School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Waconia Public Schools (ISD 110), Watertown-Mayer, Shakopee area districts; ~7,000 students daily across 94 routes; Head Start
recent_news: Built new ~80-bus depot in 2019 south of Waconia HS; 4th-gen Sam Koch joined business in 2023 — active succession into next generation suggests sellers not actively shopping.
fit_notes: Strong independent family-owned target — ~140 buses, modern 2019 facility, anchor Waconia contract, 4 generations. 4th-gen entry signals lower near-term sale appetite, but profile/scale is exactly Summit's tuck-in sweet spot in the upper Midwest. Worth long-cycle relationship building.

name: Greenwood Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Monmouth County NJ districts (Matawan-Aberdeen area, Hazlet Township BOE bidder); additional yards in Freehold and Wall, NJ
recent_news: No recent M&A or news identified; longtime Matawan-area pupil transportation contractor with multiple yard locations.
fit_notes: Small family-owned NJ operator with three yards (Matawan, Freehold, Wall) — geographic spread is interesting for NJ density play. Marter family leadership suggests potential succession opening. Low data confidence; worth deeper diligence/contact.

name: Rolling V Bus Corp
districts_or_customers: Catskills/Sullivan County NY school districts; Liberty NY area; longtime regional provider
recent_news: Sold to Beacon Mobility effective 11/1/2023 in a ~50-year-old company sale; subsequently announced purchase of new Liberty NY property. No longer independent.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax) in Nov 2023 — direct competitor platform. Exclude from outreach list.
